notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Jose Fernandez. Randy Arozarena to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Jose Fernandez. Randy Arozarena to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Mitch Garver. Geraldo Perdomo scores.

notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez grounds into a double play, third baseman Jose Fernandez to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. J.P. Crawford out at 2nd. Julio Rodríguez out at 1st.
